/.title: API Documentation
/.description: Learn everything there is to know about the PadelKit library and integrate it into your Python applications.

/quickstart.title: Quickstart
/quickstart.description: Learn how to install and use PadelKit in minutes.

/scoring-system.title: Scoring System
/scoring-system.description: Learn how the padel scoring system works, including concepts like event sourcing.

/court-geometry.title: Court Geometry
/court-geometry.description: Understand coordinate systems, enclosure variants, and the 17-point landmark model.

/court-dimensions.title: CourtDimensions
/court-dimensions.description: API reference for the CourtDimensions dataclass.

/court.title: Court
/court.description: API reference for the main court geometry class.

/court-landmark.title: CourtLandmark
/court-landmark.description: API reference for the CourtLandmark enum, including all 17 standard court positions and their coordinates.

/court-location.title: CourtLocation
/court-location.description: API reference for the CourtLocation dataclass.

/match.title: Match
/match.description: API reference for the Match class, which manages metadata and completion conditions.

/match-score-history.title: MatchScoreHistory
/match-score-history.description: API reference for tracking points through event sourcing.

/match-score.title: MatchScore
/match-score.description: API reference for the immutable snapshot of a match's current score.

/team.title: Team
/team.description: API reference for the Team dataclass.

/player.title: Player
/player.description: API reference for the Player dataclass.
